zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber於1155年11月30日出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考時，她的父親Bernard de Saint Valéry39歲，母親Anora de Dommart28歲。她於1169年與William de Braose在英國英格蘭素可布拉波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1210年在英國多瑟特可費 卡素享年55歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特可費 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber于1155年11月30日出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉瓦萊--考时，她的父亲Bernard de Saint Valéry39岁，母亲Anora de Dommart28岁。她于1169年与William de Braose在英国英格兰素可布拉波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1210年在英国多瑟特可費 卡素享年55岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特可費 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Valéry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Colette, Pierre, Raoul, Yva.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Valery, French form of Latin Valerius (see Valerio ).
Americanized form of Italian   Valerio   or   Valeri  .

variants.name: Vallery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonce, Monique.
habitational name from Vallery in Yonne, once a Gallo-Roman estate, recorded in 1218 as Valerianus.

variants.name: Valerio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ana, Manuel, Pedro, Mario, Luis, Francisco, Ramon, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Lucio, Francesco, Maurizio, Niccolo, Romeo, Vito, Amadeo, Anastasio, Aureliano, Carmela.

Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Valerio, from Latin Valerius, a Roman surname ultimately derived from Latin valere ‘to flourish, to be strong and healthy’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, among them 4th-century bishops of Trier and Zaragoza and 5th-century bishops of Sorrento and of Antibes. Compare Valery .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber was born on 30 November 1155, in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Bernard de Saint Valéry, was 39 and her mother, Anora de Dommart, was 28. She married William de Braose in 1169, in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1210, in Corfe Castle, Dorset, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Corfe Castle, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber est née le 30 novembre 1155, à Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Bernard de Saint Valéry, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Anora de Dommart, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William de Braose en 1169, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1210, à Corfe Castle, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Corfe Castle, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.of Bramber Castle, Sussex, England: Bramber Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber am 30. November 1155 in Saint-Valéry-en-Caux, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernard de Saint Valéry 39 und ihre Mutter Anora de Dommart 28. Sie hat 1169 in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom William de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1210 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Corfe Castle, Dorset, England und wurde in Corfe Castle, Dorset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramberが1155年11月30日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ヴァルeリ-エン-カウックスで生まれた時，父Bernard de Saint Valéryは39歳，母Anora de Dommartは28歳であった。1169年にイギリスイギリススセックスブランバーでWilliam de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1210年にイギリスドールセトコルフ カストルで55歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトコルフ カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber(이)가 1155년 11월 30일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-발e리--카스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard de Saint Valéry(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anora de Dommart(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에서 William de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 영국 도르세트 코르프 카스틀에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 코르프 카스틀에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber родилась 30 ноября 1155 г. в местности сеинт-валeри-ен-каукс, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Bernard de Saint Valéry было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Anora de Dommart, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Braose в 1169 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1210 г. в местности корф кастл, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности корф кастл, дорсет, Англия.

Se casó con William de Braose en 1169, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1210, en Corfe Castle, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Corfe Castle, Dorset, Inglaterra.
